subcodes.title: Words to Hannen, Latimer et al, spoken on 1912-08-01
subcodes.first_line: All the people of the world are sowing their seeds in brackish ground and they write on the surface of the water. Therefore you must consider that all their efforts are fruitless.
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @high station of the true believer, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
